settings.hero_subheading: South Africa's premier carnivorous plant and tissue culture nursery — field-tested protocols for collectors nationwide.
settings.split_text:
Bizarre Tropicals is South Africa's premier carnivorous plant and tissue culture nursery, meticulously curated by Jaco Van Den Berg. From tissue-cultured sundews to show-stopping Nepenthes, we grow and ship living specimens for collectors across the country.

Macro photography meets Southern Hemisphere culture notes on every genus page — light, water, substrate, humidity, dormancy, and feeding written for real benches and terrariums, not generic houseplant advice.

We propagate in-house, acclimate stock before shipping, and prioritise plants that arrive ready for your collection.
settings.lab_text:
Tissue culture lets us multiply rare carnivorous plants under sterile conditions — preserving genetics without wild collection or poaching. Every flask in our lab is a living archive of species that might otherwise vanish from cultivation.

From initiation to weaning, we track each line for vigour, trueness to name, and pathogen-free growth before plants ever reach the bench. That is how Bizarre Tropicals supplies collectors with ethically propagated stock you can grow with confidence.
settings.curator_heading: A message from Jaco Van Den Berg.
settings.curator_text:
I have spent years studying and growing carnivorous genera across South Africa — from windowsill Drosera to climate-controlled Nepenthes. What began as a collector's obsession became a nursery built on science, patience, and respect for these plants in the wild.

At Bizarre Tropicals, every species we list reflects hands-on culture: the humidity, the dormancy timing, the substrate that actually works on a Gauteng bench. If you are building a collection, I want you to succeed — not just make a purchase.

settings.heading: Award-winning specimens
settings.subheading: Living trophies from carnivorous plant shows — specimens we have exhibited and the classes they won on the bench.
settings.footnote: Upload show photos of each winning plant and link to the cultivar in your catalog when available.

settings.heading: Quality control
settings.text: Every plant is inspected for pests, vigour, and true-to-name characteristics before it is listed — the same standards we apply in our tissue culture lab.

settings.heading: Specialized soil
settings.text: We blend peat, perlite, and mineral components matched to each genus — never generic potting mix. Growing supplies are curated for carnivorous culture only.

settings.heading: Expert care
settings.text: Integrated genus guides, difficulty ratings, and seasonal dormancy notes ship with every order — your cultivation dossier starts on the collection page.
